helper.sceneDesc: Explore the three-dimensional environment using standard navigation commands:
helper.tip: 💡 Tip: If you get lost while moving the scene, you can always use the camera button to start over!
helper.interactDesc: Certain elements within the scene react to your actions. Hover your cursor over the environment to discover points of interest:
helper.interactOutlineDesc: When an object displays a glowing highlighted border, it indicates it is interactive and can be clicked to trigger events.
helper.bugDesc: This project is open source. If something isn't working as expected, open an Issue detailing the problem in the official repository.

mecha.title: D.Va Tokki MEKA
mecha.desc: Built by the South Korean government to fight the Gwishin omnic monstrosity, MEKAs were autonomous drones that lost their control network. To save the country, the military drafted elite pro-gamers, like world champion Hana Song (D.Va), to pilot them manually using their unparalleled reflexes.

charger.title: Dodge Charger
charger.desc: The Dodge Charger is one of the most iconic American muscle cars in history. Originally launched in the 1960s, it became a symbol of power, speed, and aggressive design, immortalized both on the racetrack and in pop culture. Famous for its roaring V8 engines and unmistakable sound, the Charger has evolved over the decades but has always maintained its brutal attitude and strength as a true legend on wheels.

ultra_t.title: Upgrade
ultra_t.desc: Galvanic Mechamorphs are a techno-organic species accidentally created on the moon Galvan B. Made of a living liquid metal, they have the unique ability to stretch, morph, and merge with any technology to completely upgrade its capabilities.

rose_sword.title: Rose's Sword
rose_sword.desc: A replica of the iconic Rose Quartz sword from Steven Universe. With its characteristic pink blade and floral-detailed guard, it's a collector's item that symbolizes strength, leadership, and compassion.

fifine_k668.title: Fifine K668 Microphone
fifine_k668.desc: A very popular USB condenser microphone known for its excellent cost-benefit. Compact and efficient, it is the ideal companion for starting in the streaming world, recording podcasts, or ensuring crystal-clear communication during gameplay.

sony_a3.title: Sony Alpha 3 Camera
sony_a3.desc: A robust digital camera widely used by content creators seeking professional quality. In the setup, it serves both to capture incredible photographs and to elevate the image quality during live streams.

ps2.title: PlayStation 2
ps2.desc: The best-selling home console of all time. A true legend in video game history that defined an entire generation of players with a vast and unforgettable library of classics.
